title: Blackbeard Watches the Crew Escape
description: The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Blackbeard, Zoro. The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Oh, this a weird looking animal.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: That octopus was like a balloon...

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: It's still an animal. It was moving...

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: So there are animals in the clouds...

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: It's a Flatfish because it's flat.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: such a tough day for him.

summary: The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.
